name: Release Notes - 3.12.11 - POS and Back Office
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes - 3.12.11 - POS and Back Office"}], "data-id": "release-notes-3-12-11-pos-and-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Release Date: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "13th January 2021"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release we've added some exciting new timesaving features, including the ability to receive Purchase Orders faster than ever! We've also added a new Click & Collect alert in POS, plus a new POS Alerts configuration option. There's plenty more other enhancements and improvements to Back Office and POS - all detailed below."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "This release includes an update to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "#po-update", "children": [{"text": "existing PO functionality"}]}, {"text": " - please ensure you share this information with your staff."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Take a look at everything we have in store for you."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this update:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#quick-receive", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders - Quick Receive Stock"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#po-update", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders - Update to screen to create manual POs"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#click-and-collect", "children": [{"text": "Click and Collect alert in POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#pos-alerts", "children": [{"text": "POS Web Order Alert configuration"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#sales-detail-export", "children": [{"text": "Sales Detail Export Report"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#bin-locations", "children": [{"text": "Bin Locations when receiving Transfers and Purchase Orders"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#po-detail", "children": [{"text": "PO Detail Report - Product Attribute filters"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Release-Notes-3-12-11-Inventory-Planning-AP", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Planning update (opens in a new window)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#improvements", "children": [{"text": "Improvements and Resolutions"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "New Features", "bold": true}], "data-id": "new-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Purchase Orders - Quick Receive Stock"}], "data-id": "purchase-orders-quick-receive-stock"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Receiving stock has never been easier with the new \"Quick Receive\" feature. This major time saving feature is simple to use, and will quickly receive all stock as Available within Retail Express. All you need to do is enter a Supplier Invoice Number (optional), any additional costs, and click Receive and Make Available - that's it!"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This feature is available when creating a new PO, or editing Incomplete, On-Order and Back-Order Purchase Orders."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppctCEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppctCEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip14 (3).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accessing Quick Receive", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Quick Receive feature is available when creating a new PO, or editing an existing Purchase Order. You'll find the \"Quick Receive\" button at the bottom of the screen. For detailed information on using the Quick Receive feature please refer to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Quick-Receive-a-PO", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders - Quick Receive a PO"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppcgvEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppcgvEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip16.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Update to Purchase Order \"Create PO\" screen"}], "data-id": "update-to-purchase-order-create-po-screen"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In preparation for future enhancements coming out later this year we've made an update to the screen used to create a new manual Purchase Order."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This is an update to existing functionality. Please ensure you share this information with your staff members that use Purchase Orders."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you first select to create a manual PO, you will now be presented with the screen below:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppd9rEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppd9rEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip4 (25).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On this page, you can enter:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Outlet"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supplier"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supplier Invoice No (optional)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you click "}, {"text": "Create", "bold": true}, {"text": ", you will be directed to the Add Products tab as per the existing functionality. No other features of Purchase Orders have been modified, and you can also click the Edit PO tab to update the Purchase Order details."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppd9wEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppd9wEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "addedproducttopo (1).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Click and Collect alert in POS"}], "data-id": "click-and-collect-alert-in-pos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We've introduced a new alert in POS for Click & Collect sales, so you can identify your online customer sales quickly, ready for processing!"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdA1EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdA1EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T135309.393.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The alert will display web order sales for the current Outlet from the last 6 months, where the stock is allocated to the sale ready to be fulfilled, and the Fulfilment Method selected is \"Store Pickup\" i.e. Click and Collect."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "These orders are included in the Web Order Alert sales as well e.g. 2 orders with Home Delivery and 1 with Store Pickup will display (3) Web Order Alert and (1) Click and Collect Order Alert."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you click the alert, you'll be redirected to the POS Lookup page displaying the open Click and Collect orders."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppcwtEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppcwtEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 - 2023-07-09T135314.714.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For detailed information please refer to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/POS-Alerts-on-Home-Page", "children": [{"text": "POS - Using POS Alerts"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "POS Web Order Alert Configuration"}], "data-id": "pos-web-order-alert-configuration"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now control when Order Alerts are displayed in POS! In this release we introduced a configuration option so you can select the logic behind when a Web Order Alert should be displayed."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdA6EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdA6EAI.jpg", {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders Ready for Fulfilment (Qty Allocated > 0)", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The alert will be displayed when there are orders with stock ready to be fulfilled"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This is the existing method used to enable the POS alert"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, if stock is being transferred from another Outlet, the alert will only be displayed once the Transfer has been received and the stock is ready to be shipped/given to the customer."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Open Orders (Qty Fulfilled < Qty Ordered)", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The alert will be displayed when there are orders where the number of products fulfilled is less than the quantity ordered by the customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the example above, the alert would be displayed even before the Transfer has been received (so you're notified immediately there is a sale that needs to be fulfilled)."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-f27a0285"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the settings:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > POS Settings > Order Alert Settings", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your preference"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The changes will be applied to all Outlets in your database. You will need to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Log-in-and-out-of-POS", "children": [{"text": "log out of POS and back in"}]}, {"text": " to see the changes."}]}, "}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdESEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdESEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T135448.944.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the button in the header to automatically update the Transfer Quantity field for all rows, or the button for individual rows to update that row only."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POS"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Added a warning when trying to process a Transfer with 0 in the Transfer Quantity field."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shippit"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We've added the option \"Do not send to Shippit\" to allow you specifically control when orders are sent to Shippit.
